acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.amount: Requested asset amount from accrued yield.

returns.sharesBurned: Share amount burned to realize that yield.

params.riskConfig_: RiskConfig contract used for utilization limits.

params.amount: Token amount to transfer into the vault.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

params.amount: Premium amount to transfer into vault.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner.

claimYield(uint256).notice: Claims LP profit only, without reducing tracked principal.

claimableYieldOf(address).notice: Returns current yield claimable by an LP address.

constructor.notice: Deploys vault with owner, collateral token and config source.

depositLiquidity(uint256).notice: Adds LP liquidity and mints proportional vault shares.

fundVault(uint256).notice: Funds the insurance vault with collateral.

getAvailableCapacity().notice: Returns currently available reservable capacity under utilization limit.

getAvailableLiquidity().notice: Returns assets currently not locked by active coverage reserves.

getReservedAmount(uint256).notice: Returns reserved amount for a specific position.

lpAssetValue(address).notice: Returns current asset value for an LP address.

payClaim(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Pays liquidation claim to recipient and clears position reserve.

previewDeposit(uint256).notice: Returns share amount that would be minted for a deposit.

previewRedeem(uint256).notice: Returns asset amount redeemable for a share amount.

receivePremium(uint256).notice: Receives premium income sent by authorized protocol modules.

redeemLiquidity(uint256).notice: Redeems LP shares for currently withdrawable assets.

releaseCapacity(uint256).notice: Releases previously reserved capacity for a position.

reserveCapacity(uint256,uint256).notice: Reserves claim capacity for an insured position.

setBaseExitCooldown(uint256).notice: Sets base cooldown applied to LP withdrawals and yield claims.

setBenefitNFT(address).notice: Sets NFT contract used for LP boost lookup.

setInsuranceController(address).notice: Sets insurance controller address allowed to reserve/release/pay claims.

setPremiumCaller(address,bool).notice: Sets whether a protocol module can deposit premium income.
